title: Dysfunctional's Graphic Overhaul
description: Making your client as fancy as possible while also improving performance.
body:
[![DGOTitle](https://codeberg.org/DysfunctionalEntertainment/Assets/raw/branch/main/Images/Modpacks/Titles/DGO%20Title.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/dysfunctionalentertainment)

# About:
Many of the most popular packs on Modrinth focus on improving fps and performance but this leaves many great mods out as they alter game elements in a way that does not directly benefit game performance. This pack aims to improve as much of the game as possible without needing server side support or getting you banned from your favorite server.

Modrinth icon contains assets from ["Ashen 16x"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) and ["Rethinking Voxels."](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)

# Warning: 
This pack contains ["Do A Barrle Roll"](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) and ["Inventory Profiles Next"](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next,) depending on what server you play on this may cause issues resulting in a ban.

# Client Download:
For ease of use install a custom Minecraft launcher like the official [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Using one of these will automatically manage and update your instance so it is recommended.

# Server Download:
This pack is client side only.

# Apex Hosting:
The best way to support our small teams projects is to purchase a server from [ApexHosting.](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=8139)

![ApexBanner](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)
